title: web.ini
text: web.ini The web.ini file defines the physical UX web widget definitions where every section is a single widget definition. Each widget definition includes the name of the widget class that implements the client (browser) side of the widget, the JavaScript, Module, and CSS files that are required to run the widget class, some placeholder layout HTML used by the IDE and IDE property definitions, IncludeScript which refers to the widget specific ProcScript or JavaScript fragments to be included and the Interface Version using which the widget is implemented. Default Location Depends on the value specified by the /adm switch. The web.ini file is located in /uniface/adm in your Uniface installation folder. File Sections [PhysicalWidgetName] Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
